title: circaea alpina
intro: Circaea alpina, also known as Alpine Enchanter's Nightshade, is a flowering plant species native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Its roots have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been reported to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the roots of Circaea alpina are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
